name: superslow
description: Superslow gives your agent superpowers: planning, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Superslow to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
